data.title: Pluri’s 2025 Annual Meeting Decisions Announced
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

An update from Pluri ( (PLUR) ) is now available.

On June 30, 2025, Pluri held its 2025 Annual Meeting where shareholders voted on several proposals. Key decisions included the election of directors, ratification of the accounting firm Kesselman & Kesselman, approval of the 2016 Equity Compensation Plan, and the determination that future advisory votes on executive compensation will occur every two years. Additionally, the approval of the exercise of warrants related to a private placement offering was confirmed, excluding shares owned by Mr. Alexandre Weinstein.

The most recent analyst rating on (PLUR) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pluri stock, see the PLUR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PLUR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PLUR is a Neutral.

The overall stock score is primarily influenced by significant financial challenges and a high-risk financial profile. Technical analysis provides some positive market sentiment, while recent corporate events such as regaining Nasdaq compliance offer a positive outlook in terms of governance and regulatory adherence. Valuation concerns, however, remain due to negative profitability metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on PLUR stock, click here.

More about Pluri

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $37.83M

data.title: ReNew Energy Receives Acquisition Offer from Consortium
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

ReNew Energy Global ( (RNW) ) has provided an announcement.

On July 3, 2025, ReNew Energy Global Plc announced receiving a final non-binding offer from a consortium including Abu Dhabi Future Energy Company PJSC-Masdar, Canada Pension Plan Investment Board, and others to acquire the company’s remaining shares for $8.00 per share. This offer represents a significant premium over previous proposals and the company’s undisturbed share price. The Special Committee of ReNew’s Board is evaluating the offer with independent advisors, and discussions with the consortium are ongoing, with no assurance of a transaction’s completion.

The most recent analyst rating on (RNW) stock is a Buy with a $7.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ReNew Energy Global stock, see the RNW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RNW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RNW is a Neutral.

ReNew Energy Global scores moderately due to strong operational efficiency and growth in portfolios, as highlighted in the earnings call. However, concerns about high leverage, cash flow challenges, and a high P/E ratio weigh down the overall score. The technical outlook is cautious, with mixed indicators suggesting potential volatility in the short term.

To see Spark’s full report on RNW stock, click here.

More about ReNew Energy Global

ReNew Energy Global Plc is a leading decarbonization solutions company listed on Nasdaq, with a substantial clean energy portfolio of approximately 18.5 GWs. It is a major independent power producer in India, offering comprehensive solutions in clean energy, digitalization, storage, and carbon markets to address climate change.

Average Trading Volume: 831,933

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.47B

data.title: SEALSQ Corp Reports H1 2025 Financials and Strategic Growth Plans
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

WISeKey International Holding ( (WKEY) ) has issued an announcement.

On July 3, 2025, SEALSQ Corp announced its preliminary unaudited financial metrics for H1 2025, reporting a revenue of $4.8 million, consistent with the same period in 2024. The company is in a transitional phase, shifting from legacy products to next-generation post-quantum solutions. SEALSQ anticipates a significant revenue increase in the second half of 2025, driven by major commercial projects and the consolidation of revenues from the IC’ALPS acquisition, which was signed in May 2025. The company also provided a revenue guidance for FY 2025, expecting growth between 45% and 82%, and outlined strategic plans for 2026, including the Quantix Edge project and the launch of the TPM Post-Quantum resistant chip. SEALSQ’s robust cash reserves and strategic investments position it well for future growth in the quantum technology sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (WKEY) stock is a Buy with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on WISeKey International Holding stock, see the WKEY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WKEY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WKEY is a Neutral.

WISeKey’s overall stock score reflects substantial financial challenges and a negative valuation. While technical indicators suggest some positive momentum, and the long-term guidance is optimistic, the immediate financial performance is weak, driving a lower overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on WKEY stock, click here.

More about WISeKey International Holding

SEALSQ Corp, a subsidiary of WISeKey International Holding, is a company specializing in the development and sale of semiconductors, PKI, and post-quantum technology hardware and software products. The company is focused on providing quantum-resistant security solutions and has a significant market focus on industries such as defense, IoT, satellites, and automotive.

Average Trading Volume: 183,954

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $70.7M

data.title: Noble Plains Advances Drill Permitting in Shirley Basin Uranium District
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

Indigo Exploration ( (TSE:NOBL) ) has issued an announcement.

Noble Plains Uranium Corp. has submitted a drill permit application for a 15-hole program at the Shirley Central Property, a month after acquiring the claims. This initiative is part of the company’s strategy to rapidly convert brownfield assets into compliant uranium resources. The property is strategically located amidst active uranium developers, enhancing its potential as a production hub. By leveraging historical data and modern exploration methods, Noble Plains aims to conduct a cost-effective and efficient drill campaign, with drilling expected to commence by the end of the third quarter. The company’s focus on in-situ recovery aligns with its commitment to environmentally responsible exploration, benefiting from Wyoming’s streamlined permitting environment.

More about Indigo Exploration

Noble Plains Uranium Corp. operates in the uranium industry, focusing on the exploration and development of uranium resources. The company is strategically positioned in the Shirley Basin, a prominent uranium district in Wyoming, USA, known for its infrastructure and historical production. Noble Plains aims to convert brownfield assets into compliant uranium resources, leveraging modern exploration techniques and environmentally responsible methods such as in-situ recovery.

Average Trading Volume: 57,990

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$8.03M

See more data about NOBL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Imperial Brands ( (GB:IMB) ) just unveiled an update.

Imperial Brands PLC announced the repurchase and cancellation of 217,698 ordinary shares as part of its GBP 1.25 billion share repurchase program. This transaction, executed through Barclays Capital Securities, will reduce the total number of shares in issue to 813,570,193, potentially affecting shareholder calculations under the Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules.
